title: SEELE Inefficient
wikitext:
[]: SEELE: Inefficient?             Quote Post by Tab » Mon Jul 13, 2009 11:51 pm This may be completely off base as I am extremely sleep deprived, however, Adam was capable of initiating Second Impact; an event which would wipe all Black Moon descendants from the Earth while maintaining the descendants of the White Moon (which was throttled due to the Katsuragi Team and localized to Antarctica). Following that, SEELE and Gehirn/Nerv wait fifteen years until the Angels awaken, then spend another year killing them off. Would it not follow that Lilith would be capable of a similar Second Impact-type scenario? Namely that, if prompted, she could simply wipe White Moon life from the planet while maintaining her Black Moon progeny? So my question is this. If SEELE's intention was to initiate Human Instrumentality using Adam and Lilith, why wait fifteen years, spend another year and inflict unimaginable suffering on various parts of the world by allowing the Angels to awaken and be battled, rather than simply hit up Adam, take her home, and prod Lilith to pull a 2I and wipe all then-fetal Angel life from the planet? Aside from the obvious answer that then there would be no series to make or real story to tell, and the slightly less obvious answer of the necessity of psychologically conditioning the various individuals involved by allowing the scenario to unfold, the former option seems just a tad bit inefficient in contrast to the latter, I'd say. Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:48 am You could write books about how many things regarding SEELE / NERV are inefficient.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:59 am Best guess at the moment is that it simply couldn't happen that way, maybe something was specified in the secret dead sea scrolls... this .

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Jul 14, 2009 9:00 am Angels have no set form and can manipulate their A.T. Fields to take any form they like. It's already been demonstrated that they can live in a Lilith-based environment, or there would be no Angel attacks. The world as it exists in Eva has already been formatted to support Lillim. Thus if Instrumentality were implemented before the Angels were destroyed, they would be able to find Lilith or Adam unopposed and that would be the end of complimented Lilim.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jul 14, 2009 9:16 am That makes sense but of course as stated no story line but I feel that if they did wish to just get rid of the Angels that yes they could do that or they could have found all of them and got rid of them before they awoke. Maybe they did it like they did to keep the scenario as it is "written".

[]:             Quote Post by Tab » Tue Jul 14, 2009 9:16 am thewayneiac wrote: if Instrumentality were implemented before the Angels were destroyed, they would be able to find Lilith or Adam unopposed

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:31 pm I always figured it wasn't so much "Second Impact wiping out all but the Sol's children", but more "Fucking delete everything first, THEN form babby," So using Lilith would've destroyed fucking everything, then restarted the biosphere.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 14, 2009 3:58 pm Tab wrote: The CI notes mention that an Angel contacting Lilith would spell out their own demise as well (and all life, from any seed).

[]:             Quote Post by OKdesuKA » Tue Jul 14, 2009 5:37 pm Aside from the obvious answer that then there would be no series to make or real story to tell

[]:             Quote Post by Tab » Wed Jul 15, 2009 9:19 am OKdesuKA wrote: That's about the only legit answer you will probably get, I really doubt he had it that detailed and planned out.

[]: Re: SEELE: Inefficient?             Quote Post by VoidEater » Wed Jul 15, 2009 4:02 pm Tab wrote: Would it not follow that Lilith would be capable of a similar Second Impact-type scenario? Namely that, if prompted, she could simply wipe White Moon life from the planet while maintaining her Black Moon progeny?

[]: Re: SEELE: Inefficient?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 15, 2009 4:32 pm VoidEater wrote: Was 2I a result of Adam's S2?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:10 pm It's unlikely SEELE knew precisely what they were doing when they first found Adam. It seems from the dialogue 2I didn't go down like they planned. What's more though, they need the power of the S2 and the means to control it which they obviously didn't have when they first found Adam. They also needed an ability to control Lilith, which they also didn't have. It's very unclear as to exactly where Lilith's soul was when they first found her. I think most of the other points have been covered, but the long and short of it is that they simply couldn't at the time.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:11 pm ^ Well, Lilith's soul was close enough to be injected/salvaged into Rei (and, per chance, 00), and Rei seems to come on the scene at about the time of the CE... @Reichu-goddess: Mmmm, delicious Lilith fat... But in essence it was not Adam's S2 that powered transmogrification, just the blooey at the end...? I guess I'm missing the distinction, I kinda saw the damage to the biosphere as being simply the big bang...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:35 pm How is babby formed? How Impact happen if Lilim touch Lilith? I assume something like TI would happen but im sure it would have a different result.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:37 pm VoidEater wrote: Well, Lilith's soul was close enough to be injected/salvaged into Rei (and, per chance, 00),

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:47 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: But then there's the whole problem of why a souled-up Lilith would let these puny humans perform all these experiments on her including sapping her bio-mass for 01.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Wed Jul 15, 2009 9:38 pm Reichu wrote: You'd have to do something much weirder to get results.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jul 15, 2009 11:07 pm Holy Diver wrote: Reichu wrote: You'd have to do something much weirder to get results.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Jul 16, 2009 12:12 am Reichu wrote: "You snooze, you lose."
